original: This suit of combat armor looks to have been assembled by salvaged or looted parts from a half-dozen different companies and designs. Somehow, it all came together in an effective-looking package; the coat of matte black paint certainly helps. For some reason the helmet has a fold-up pair of mouse ears, presumably in keeping with a pirate gang’s aesthetics.
